a:Td493,<div class="specification">
<p>When feed for animals is stored, moisture levels need to be kept low to prevent the growth of fungi. Feed was exposed to 15 % moisture and placed into a respirometer. O<sub>2</sub> consumption was monitored using the respirometer over a period of six days.</p>
<p><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
<p style="text-align: center;">[Source: © International Baccalaureate Organization 2019]</p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline how O<sub>2</sub> consumption is measured using a respirometer.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Suggest <strong>one</strong> conclusion that can be drawn from the results shown in the graph.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Other than humidity, suggest a variable that would need to be controlled in this experiment.</p>
<div class="marks">[1]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Outline the role of fungi in nutrient cycling.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>b:T52d,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. a CO<sub>2</sub> absorber/KOH is added ✔</p>
<p>b. a bubble/starting water level is measured ✔ </p>
<p>c. «the rate of» movement of the bubble/pressure reduction is a measure of O<sub>2</sub> consumption ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. as fungus grows, the rate of oxygen consumption increases ✔</p>
<p>b. around day 4/5 fungus begins to grow/no growth in days 1–3 ✔ </p>
<p>c. the rate of fungus growth/rate of respiration is highest after 5 days ✔</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>temperature/amount or type of feed «in the respirometer»/amount of CO<sub>2</sub> absorber<br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>other reasonable suggestion ✔</p>
<p><em>Do not accept light</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>a. act as saprotrophs/decomposers ✔ </p>
<p>b. rot/feed on/break down organic matter/food/organisms <br/><em><strong>OR</strong></em><br/>return nutrients trapped in organic matter to the cycle/soil ✔</p>
<p><em>Do not accept detritivores</em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>c:T443,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Very few candidates achieved a mark. Some confused a respirometer with a spirometer; others mentioned data logging probes. Credit was given for mention of a water column. Only the highest scoring candidates understood that a carbon dioxide absorber is required to allow pressure changes to be measured.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.i.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Many candidates described what was shown by the graph rather than making a conclusion related to the growth of fungi. Thus “oxygen consumption increased after day 4” or references to the feed respiring were common answers.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.ii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>Often more than one answer was given but only the first was marked. Temperature and amount of feed were the most common answers.</p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.iii.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
[N/A]
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/biology/topic/2/","children":["← back to ","Biology"," topic ","2"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"19M.3.SL.TZ1.2"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Biology"}],null,["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","3"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"19M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","2-8-cell-respiration, 4-1-species-communities-and-ecosystems"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$a"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}]]}]
